economic_mechanism: Persistent cross-sectional left-tail heterogeneity from sector cyclicality, concentration, and risk-transfer demand should make the lowest prior downside-semivariance ETF less likely than the highest-ranked control to breach a 5% close barrier over the next ten sessions inside a lag-safe broad-market uptrend.
candidate_or_family_scope: LOW_DOWNSIDE_SEMIVARIANCE_ETF_PCS_21D_V1 / noncollapse|cross_section_low_downside_semivariance_60d|liquid_etfs_spy_qqq_iwm_xlf_xle_xlk_xli_xlv|spy_sma100_uptrend_positive60d|10session_close_barrier5pct|pcs21d2wide_planned on a fixed present-day SPY, QQQ, IWM, XLF, XLE, XLK, XLI, XLV panel; future conditional one-lot 18-24 DTE $2-wide PCS only, capital_fit_usd=200, max_loss_usd=200 structural width bound before credit/closing friction, max_lots=1; zero option pricing.
falsifier: Close if train has fewer than 60 rank dates or six represented symbols on either selected side; low-rank 5% close-barrier breach exceeds 10%; high-minus-low edge is below five percentage points; one-sided 90% complete-rank-date block-bootstrap lower bound is non-positive; low-rank worst-decile close path is no milder than high-rank control; semivariance edge is no stronger than the same-date plain-HV diagnostic; or chronology, overlap, source hash, population, finite-value, strict-JSON, unread-holdout, or integrity fails.

strategy_advancement.summary: The exact downside-semivariance ETF non-collapse family remained at F0. Absolute hazard, relative edge, uncertainty, tail, breadth, density, and integrity passed, but the frozen mechanism-specificity gate failed because same-date plain HV separated the endpoint more strongly. Holdout and option pricing remain sealed.

search_information.summary: The wake added and exercised a lag-safe ETF downside-semivariance/direct-barrier lab with complete-rank-date bootstrap, a same-date plain-HV specificity comparator, strict holdout identity, and one-lot authority labels; it decisively closed the exact mechanism, repaired the sole-failure label, and forced the second-no-advance material pivot.

useful_deltas.summary: Added a train-first fixed-panel ETF tail-hazard lab that uses completed-bar features, next-session entry, globally non-overlapping ten-session paths, complete-rank-date circular blocks, same-date plain-HV specificity, strict JSON, sealed holdout identity, and explicit one-lot planning/authority boundaries.

Closed the exact downside-semivariance ETF non-collapse family at F0 on 178 train rank dates: low/high breach 4.4944%/11.2360%, semivariance edge +6.7416pp, LB90 +3.9326pp, but plain-HV edge +7.8652pp; failed gate exactly semivariance_edge_exceeds_plain_hv, holdout 119 unread, pricing calls zero.

Repaired the claim-bearing dominant-failure label so a sole specificity failure cannot be overstated as an absolute, relative, uncertainty, tail, or breadth failure; regression assertions require specificity-only wording and reject the word absolute on that path.

Recorded two consecutive active-epoch no-advances (1912 and 2007), set strategy_pivot_required=true for the next wake, rejected laundering the inspected plain-HV comparator into a successor label, preserved rank-family and holdout quarantines, and selected one materially different SPY regime-only theta-carry proxy-PnL seed.

critic_findings.finding: The payload overstated a full multi-gate failure even though only semivariance_edge_exceeds_plain_hv failed.
critic_findings.rationale: Current machinery emits mechanism non-specificity only when specificity is the sole failed gate, names the plain-HV comparator, states every other frozen gate passed, and a focused assertion rejects absolute-failure wording on that path.

critic_findings.finding: Holdout end wording blurred the last rank date with the later final exit date.
critic_findings.rationale: The closeout now distinguishes rank dates 2019-11-13 through 2026-06-16 from exits through 2026-07-02. Machinery serializes both last_rank_date and last_exit_date, and the payload test verifies a sealed identity without outcomes.

critic_findings.finding: The integrated NEXT can continue the inspected plain-HV absolute-barrier rank lane after the second epoch no-advance.
critic_findings.rationale: Living surfaces use only SPY_INDEX_THETA_CARRY_PCS_21D_DUAL_COST_F0, a regime-only single-index theta-carry proxy option-PnL mechanism with no cross-sectional HV or semivariance rank. The inspected plain-HV comparator is not promoted.

critic_findings.finding: Readiness can remain a NEXT-only patch while its decision block still describes the now-superseded 1912 wake.
critic_findings.rationale: Readiness is fully rewritten for stamp 2007 with the exact FAMILY_CLOSED decision, sole failed gate, concentration and close-only boundaries, sealed holdout, no authority change, no-advance streak two, pivot required, and the merged NEXT.

critic_findings.finding: Severe SPY/XLV low-rank and XLE high-rank concentration supports a broad ETF-selection or capital claim.
critic_findings.rationale: Concentration is explicitly limiting: the fixed present-day panel can support only the exact in-sample mechanism close, not generalization, F1, L1, a capital seat, or a paper intent.

critic_findings.finding: Absolute hazard quality or positive relative evidence can nearly promote the family despite the frozen specificity failure.
critic_findings.rationale: Mechanism specificity was conjunctive and failed. Strategy advancement is false; the 119-blueprint holdout remains outcome-unread, pricing calls are zero, and no F1/F2/L1/registry/paper/shadow/arm/live authority exists.

data_dependencies: No new data are required to preserve this F0 family close; any future L1 or paper authority would require claim-appropriate option marks, listed contract grids, two-leg costs/fills, and managed-path evidence.
The sealed 72a6d18430031f03421d27a2680f53d42f099357a5c6685b1b3db2ce1a7dcd5d holdout belongs to the closed rank experiment and must not be spent on the successor mechanism.
next: SPY_INDEX_THETA_CARRY_PCS_21D_DUAL_COST_F0: freeze a regime-only SPY one-lot 18-24 DTE $2-wide PCS (short 0.18-0.25 delta, minimum $0.30 credit, positive bids, two-leg NBBO width <=$0.20 when quotes exist, 50% harvest, 5% underlying-close invalidation, hard approximately ten-session stop), capital_fit_usd=200, structural max_loss_usd=200 before credit/friction, max_lots=1; evaluate chronological train then untouched holdout proxy option path PnL under both 5% adverse leg slip and $0.01-per-leg half-spread with non-vacuous trade, max-loss, window-DD, chronology, and integrity gates. No cross-sectional HV/semivariance rank, no use of holdout 72a6d184..., and no L1, registry, paper force, shadow, arm, broker, or live action from proxy evidence.
